title: 6 Pairs Assorted Baby Girls Frilly Lace Socks 3-6 Years Princess Girls Cute Bow Knee High Socks Long Stocking Kids Breathable Cotton Lace Top Ankle Socks Toddler Non Skid Long Socks
features: Valuable Baby Girls Socks Packs: coming with 3 pairs of Lace Top Ankle Socks and 3 pairs of Bowknot Knee High Socks in cute assorted colors. With different lengths of socks in value packs, superb practical and beautiful to complete all the outfits of your little princess girls

One Size Fit Zones for Growth: these girls socks size 3-6 Y fit kids feet length 14-16 CM, suggest ages 3-6 years old. Stretchy material and ribbed knitting provides a good fit to grow with your child that is comfortable as they wiggle & grow

Skin-friendly Cotton & Breathable: thanks to the skin-friendly cotton material, strong stretchy knitting and comfy toe seam, it’s pretty soft, flexible and moisture-wicking, keeping your little girls’s feet in comfort all day long and odor resistant. This girls socks in proper thickness for Summer, early Autumn and Spring

Anti-slip Baby Girls Socks: the knee high socks with grips, as the bottom designed with traction grips ideal for safe footing to prevent your kids from slipping on the smooth floor, wooden or tile floor

Perfect Baby Girls Gift: Chic little princess socks to complete princess dress, princess shoes, or just causal wear, must-have fashionable accessories for your little pricess, also this toddler girls socks is great gift ideal for Baby shower, Children’s day, Birthday, Christmas, Thanksgiving day, or holidays
description: These value package= 3 pairs of ankle socks + 3 pairs of knee high socks is great socks combo for baby girls age from 1-3 years old. The ankle socks is designed with lace top, the knee high stocking is detailed with bowknot, all these socks are pretty cute to complete your little princess look. These girls socks is not only offering the stylish, also the ultimate comfort. They have a gentle elasticated double welt & a comfort toe seam, adopted skin-friendly soft and sweat absorbing material to keep your little girls in comfort all day long! Specification: Material: 78% cotton, 20% polyester with 2% elastane Size: fit kids feet length 14-16 CM, suggest ages 3-6 years old Color: ankle socks in white, pink and yellow; knee high socks in white, pink and grey Feature: Skin-friendly, Soft and comfortable to wear Sweat-absorbing, keep feet dry and cool Stretchy and flexible, growing with your kids from 3-6 years Non-Slipping, efficiently support the active little boys and girls as they are walking or crawling on floor, or playing on the slide or trampoline.
